controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (mortgage guarantee companies) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Mortgage Guarantee
Companies) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (mortgage guarantee companies) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mortgage guarantee companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'mgcs' and individually as a 'mgc') which has been granted cert
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Mortgage Guarantee Companies (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'MGCs' and individually as a 'MGC') which has been granted
Certificate of Registration under the scheme of Registration of Mortgage Guarantee
Companies by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mortgage guarantee companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'mgcs' and individually as a 'mgc') which has been granted cert

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mgcs based on the layer in which the mgc is categorised: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, e
controls.control_description:
The provisions specified in the following Directions, where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions, shall be applicable to MGCs based on the layer in which the
MGC is categorised:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mgcs based on the layer in which the mgc is categorised: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, e

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
Note: For ample clarity, it is clarified that the instructions contained in these
Directions shall prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with the above mentioned
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mgcs in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 4 abov
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to MGCs in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions
contained in the Directions mentioned in paragraph 4 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mgcs in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 4 abov

controls.control_objective: To ensure make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
A MGC may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and
Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie in any of the layers of the regulatory structure depending on the parameters of the scale based regulatory framework specified in paragraph 8 to 3
controls.control_description:
A MGC may lie in any of the layers of the regulatory structure depending on the
parameters of the scale based regulatory framework specified in paragraph 8 to 36 of
<image>
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions
and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to lie in any of the layers of the regulatory structure depending on the parameters of the scale based regulatory framework specified in paragraph 8 to 3

controls.control_description:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'bank' means -
Note: If an investee company is a loss making company, the earning value will be
taken at zero;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'bank' means - note: if an investee company is a loss making company, the earning value will be taken at

controls.control_objective: To ensure the mean of the earning value and the breakup value
controls.control_description: (12) 'fair value' means the mean of the earning value and the breakup value;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the mean of the earning value and the breakup value

controls.control_objective: To ensure a contract of guarantee as defined in section 126 of the indian contract act, 1872 (9 of 1872)
controls.control_description:
(13) 'guarantee' means a contract of guarantee as defined in section 126 of the Indian
Contract Act, 1872 (9 of 1872);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a contract of guarantee as defined in section 126 of the indian contract act, 1872 (9 of 1872)

controls.control_objective: To ensure housing finance company as defined in reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(14) 'housing finance company' means housing finance company as defined in Reserve
Bank of India (Housing Finance Companies) Directions, 2025;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to housing finance company as defined in reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by reserve bank from time to time for the purpose of construction/ repairs/ upgradation of a house or residential property or acquisition
controls.control_description:
(15) 'housing loan' means any loan or advance granted to an individual or any other
entity which may be specified by Reserve Bank from time to time for the purpose of
construction/ repairs/ upgradation of a house or residential property or acquisition of a
house or residential property or both, i.e., house and residential property;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by reserve bank from time to time for the purpose of construction/ repairs/ upgradation of a house or residential property or acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 202
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 202

Note: The capital treatment for the subordinated debt shall also be as per Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be as per reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure holding of a beneficial interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together in the shares of a company, the amoun
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to holding of a beneficial interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together in the shares of a company, the amoun

controls.control_objective: To ensure owned fund as reduced by investment in shares of other nonbanking financial companies and in shares, debentures, bonds, outstanding loans and advances
controls.control_description:
(31) 'Tier 1 capital' means owned fund as reduced by investment in shares of other
nonbanking financial companies and in shares, debentures, bonds, outstanding loans
and advances including hire purchase and lease finance made to and deposits with
Note: Investment in shares of subsidiaries, companies in the same group and other
NBFCs refers to that which has been acquired by the mortgage guarantee company in
satisfaction of debt;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to owned fund as reduced by investment in shares of other nonbanking financial companies and in shares, debentures, bonds, outstanding loans and advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure , by notification, specify for the purposes of these guidelines
controls.control_description:
(v) such other bank which the Reserve Bank may, by notification, specify for
the purposes of these guidelines;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , by notification, specify for the purposes of these guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company as defined in section 5(c) of the banking regulation act, 1949 (act 10 of 1949)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'banking company' means a banking company as defined in Section 5(c) of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Act 10 of 1949);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company as defined in section 5(c) of the banking regulation act, 1949 (act 10 of 1949)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure the equity capital and reserves as reduced by intangible assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee compa
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the equity capital and reserves as reduced by intangible assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee compa

controls.control_objective: To ensure book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but not received
controls.control_description:
(5) 'carrying cost' means book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but
not received;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but not received

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or a corresponding provision under companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(6) 'company' means a company registered under Section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or a corresponding provision under Companies Act, 2013;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or a corresponding provision under companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure as defined in clause (da) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(7) 'corresponding new bank' means as defined in clause (da) of Section 5 of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to as defined in clause (da) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure a bank or housing finance company
controls.control_description: (8) 'creditor institution' means a bank or housing finance company;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a bank or housing finance company

controls.control_objective: To ensure non-payment on the due date of any principal debt or interest thereon payable by a borrower to any creditor institution
controls.control_description:
<image>
(9) 'default' means non-payment on the due date of any principal debt or interest
thereon payable by a borrower to any creditor institution;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to non-payment on the due date of any principal debt or interest thereon payable by a borrower to any creditor institution

controls.control_objective: To ensure an asset which remains a sub-standard asset for a period exceeding 12 months
controls.control_description:
(10) 'doubtful asset' means an asset which remains a sub-standard asset for a period
exceeding 12 months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an asset which remains a sub-standard asset for a period exceeding 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure the value of an equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary
controls.control_description:
(11) 'earning value' means the value of an equity share computed by taking the average
of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary
and non-recurring items, for the immediately preceding three years and further divided by
the number of equity shares of the investee company and capitalised at the following rate
:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the value of an equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said acts
controls.control_description:
The words or expressions used in this Chapter but not defined herein and defined in
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 (Act 2 of 1934), or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
(Act 10 of 1949) shall have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said acts

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the companies act, 1956 or companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
Any other words or expressions not defined in the said Acts shall have the same meaning
as assigned to them in the Companies Act, 1956 or Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the companies act, 1956 or companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems
controls.control_description:
The MGC shall put in place approved policies and establish periodic review
mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter alia, constitution of a nomination and remuneration committee, principles for fixed/variable pay structures and malus/clawback provisio
controls.control_description:
(4) Compensation: The policy shall include, inter alia, constitution of a Nomination and
Remuneration Committee, principles for fixed/variable pay structures and
malus/clawback provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter alia, constitution of a nomination and remuneration committee, principles for fixed/variable pay structures and malus/clawback provisio

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence the business of providing mortgage guarantee after - (1) obtaining a certificate of registration from the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall commence the business of providing mortgage guarantee after -
(1) obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence the business of providing mortgage guarantee after - (1) obtaining a certificate of registration from the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , by notification, specify
controls.control_description:
and
(2) having a net owned fund of ₹100 crore or such other higher amount, as the
Reserve Bank may, by notification, specify.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , by notification, specify

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application for registration to the reserve bank in such form as may be specified by the reserve bank for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Every MGC shall make an application for registration to the Reserve Bank in such
form as may be specified by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application for registration to the reserve bank in such form as may be specified by the reserve bank for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled :- <image> (1) the mgc shall primarily transact the business of providing mortgage
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank, for the purpose of considering the application for registration, shall
require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled :-
<image>
(1) the MGC shall primarily transact the business of providing mortgage guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled :- <image> (1) the mgc shall primarily transact the business of providing mortgage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to comply with the above when at least 90 per cent of the business turnover is mortgage guarantee business or at least 90 per cent of the gr
controls.control_description:
A
MGC shall be deemed to comply with the above when at least 90 per cent of the
business turnover is mortgage guarantee business or at least 90 per cent of the gross
income is from mortgage guarantee business (which includes the income derived from
reinvesting the income generated from mortgage guarantee business);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to comply with the above when at least 90 per cent of the business turnover is mortgage guarantee business or at least 90 per cent of the gr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in a position to pay its liabilities arising from the contracts of guarantee it may enter into
controls.control_description:
(2) the MGC is or shall be in a position to pay its liabilities arising from the contracts
of guarantee it may enter into;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in a position to pay its liabilities arising from the contracts of guarantee it may enter into

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudicial to the public interest
controls.control_description:
(4) the general character of the management or the proposed management of the
MGC shall not be prejudicial to the public interest;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudicial to the public interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a subsidiary of any other company including a company registered or incorporated under any law in force outside india
controls.control_description:
(6) a MGC shall have a well diversified shareholding and shall not be a subsidiary of
any other company including a company registered or incorporated under any law in
force outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a subsidiary of any other company including a company registered or incorporated under any law in force outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure , directly or indirectly, have any controlling interest in the mgc
controls.control_description:
Further, no individual, association or body of individuals whether
incorporated or not, partnership firm, company or company registered or incorporated
under any law in force outside India shall, directly or indirectly, have any controlling
interest in the MGC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , directly or indirectly, have any controlling interest in the mgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to a mgc
controls.control_description:
(7) Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) Policy as notified from time to time by the Reserve
Bank, shall apply to a MGC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to a mgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure if the foreign entity has substantial interest in the applicant mgc, it should be regulated by a home country financial regulator and should itself pr
controls.control_description:
Provided that if the foreign entity has substantial interest in the applicant MGC,
it should be regulated by a home country financial regulator and should itself
preferably be a MGC and have a good track record of operating as a MGC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to if the foreign entity has substantial interest in the applicant mgc, it should be regulated by a home country financial regulator and should itself pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - registration, exemptions a
controls.control_description:
<image>
(8) Investment from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions: MGC shall refer to the
instructions as prescribed in paragraph 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale
Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - registration, exemptions a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the mgc to commence or to carry on the business in india
controls.control_description:
(9) The public interest shall be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the
MGC to commence or to carry on the business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the mgc to commence or to carry on the business in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudicial to the operation and growth of the housing finance sector of the country
controls.control_description:
(10) The grant of certificate of registration shall not be prejudicial to the operation and
growth of the housing finance sector of the country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudicial to the operation and growth of the housing finance sector of the country

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudicial to the public interest and the housing finance sector in india
controls.control_description:
and
(12) Any other condition, fulfillment of which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank, shall
be necessary to ensure that the commencement of or carrying on the business in India
by a MGC shall not be prejudicial to the public interest and the housing finance sector
in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudicial to the public interest and the housing finance sector in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the conditions specified in sub paragraphs of paragraph 13 are fulfilled, grant a certificate of registration subject to
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the conditions specified in sub
paragraphs of paragraph 13 are fulfilled, grant a certificate of registration subject to such
conditions which it may consider fit to impose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the conditions specified in sub paragraphs of paragraph 13 are fulfilled, grant a certificate of registration subject to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under the regulatory and supervisory jurisdiction of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The MGC shall be under the regulatory and supervisory jurisdiction of the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under the regulatory and supervisory jurisdiction of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure cancel a certificate of registration granted to a mgc
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cancel a certificate of registration granted to a mgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
If a MGC undertakes any other business as specified in Section 45I(c) of the RBI Act
1934 within the permitted limit, prudential and other regulations as applicable (including
valuation of investments, asset classification and provisioning, etc.,) for an NBFC-ICC as
prescribed in paragraph 5 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies
- Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025
shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out insurance business
controls.control_description: The MGC shall not carry out insurance business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out insurance business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows: (1) it shall be a contract of guarantee under section 126 of the indian contract act, 1872
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows: (1) it shall be a contract of guarantee under section 126 of the indian contract act, 1872

controls.control_objective: To ensure be unconditional and irrevocable and the guarantee obtained shall be free from coercion, undue influence, fraud, misrepresentation, and / or mistake u
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be unconditional and irrevocable and the guarantee obtained shall be free from coercion, undue influence, fraud, misrepresentation, and / or mistake u

controls.control_objective: To ensure guarantee the repayment of the principal and interest outstanding in the housing loan account of the borrower, up to the amount of guarantee
controls.control_description:
(3) it shall guarantee the repayment of the principal and interest outstanding in
the housing loan account of the borrower, up to the amount of guarantee;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to guarantee the repayment of the principal and interest outstanding in the housing loan account of the borrower, up to the amount of guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay the guaranteed amount on invocation without any adjustment against the realisable value of the mortgage property
controls.control_description:
(4) the guarantor shall pay the guaranteed amount on invocation without any
adjustment against the realisable value of the mortgage property;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay the guaranteed amount on invocation without any adjustment against the realisable value of the mortgage property

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a tri-partite contract among the borrower, the creditor institution and the mgc, which provides the mortgage guarantee
controls.control_description:
and
(5) it shall be a tri-partite contract among the borrower, the creditor institution
and the MGC, which provides the mortgage guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a tri-partite contract among the borrower, the creditor institution and the mgc, which provides the mortgage guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept public deposits
controls.control_description: Acceptance of public deposits - A MGC shall not accept public deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept public deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail external commercial borrowings
controls.control_description:
External Commercial Borrowings - A MGC shall not avail External Commercial
Borrowings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail external commercial borrowings

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net owned fund of ₹100 crore at the time of commencement of business, which shall be reviewed for enhancement after three years
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall have a minimum net owned fund of ₹100 crore at the time of
commencement of business, which shall be reviewed for enhancement after three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net owned fund of ₹100 crore at the time of commencement of business, which shall be reviewed for enhancement after three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 10 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items or any other
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall maintain a capital adequacy ratio consisting of Tier 1 and Tier 2 capital
which shall not be less than 10 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on
balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items or any other
percentage that may be prescribed by the Reserve Bank for the purpose, from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 10 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items or any other

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain at least six per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as tier
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall maintain at least six per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on
balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as Tier 1 capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain at least six per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as tier

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
The total of Tier 2 capital, at any point of time, shall not exceed 100 per cent of Tier 1
capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio
controls.control_description:
The aggregate shall be taken into account for reckoning the
minimum capital ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: risk weightage items of assets - on-balance sheet items per cent notes:
controls.control_description:
The risk weighted asset shall be calculated as the weighted
aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder:
Risk Weightage
Items of Assets - On-Balance Sheet Items
per cent
Notes:
(1) Netting may be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation or
for bad and doubtful debts have been made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: risk weightage items of assets - on-balance sheet items per cent notes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a weightage of 'zero'
controls.control_description:
(2) Assets which have been deducted from owned fund to arrive at net owned fund shall
have a weightage of 'zero'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a weightage of 'zero'

controls.control_objective: To ensure net off the amount of cash margin/ caution money/ security deposits (against which right to set-off is available) held as collateral against the advan
controls.control_description:
(3) While calculating the aggregate of funded exposure of a borrower for the purpose
of assignment of risk weight, a MGC may net off the amount of cash margin/ caution money/ security deposits (against which right to set-off is available) held as collateral against the advances out of the total outstanding exposure of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to net off the amount of cash margin/ caution money/ security deposits (against which right to set-off is available) held as collateral against the advan

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be again multiplied by the risk weight as applicable to the respective counterparties
controls.control_description:
The credit equivalent value of each item shall have to be again multiplied by the risk
weight as applicable to the respective counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be again multiplied by the risk weight as applicable to the respective counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio
controls.control_description:
The aggregate risk weighted value
shall be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as per the credit conversion factors for non-funded items as detailed hereunder: nature of item credit conversion factor - percentage i)
controls.control_description:
The credit equivalent
value of the off-balance sheet items shall be calculated as per the credit conversion
factors for non-funded items as detailed hereunder:
Nature of Item Credit Conversion Factor - Percentage
i) Mortgage Guarantees 50
ii) Underwriting obligations in r/o capital investment such as shares / debentures, etc
iii) Partly-paid shares / debentures 100
iv) Lease contracts entered into but yet to be executed 100
v) Other contingent liabilities 50
Note: Cash margins / deposits shall be deducted before applying the conversion factor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as per the credit conversion factors for non-funded items as detailed hereunder: nature of item credit conversion factor - percentage i)

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent of the company's tier 1 and tier 2 capital
controls.control_description:
A single guarantee shall not exceed 10 per cent of the company's Tier 1 and Tier 2
capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent of the company's tier 1 and tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 54 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequa
controls.control_description:
MGC in Middle and above layers shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in
Paragraph 54 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 54 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequa

controls.control_objective: To ensure book income on accrual basis on securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the central government or a state government
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall book income on accrual basis on securities of corporate bodies / public
sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal
have been guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government, provided
interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to book income on accrual basis on securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the central government or a state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure book income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies on accrual basis provided dividend on the shares has been declared by the corporate body in it
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall book income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies on accrual
basis provided dividend on the shares has been declared by the corporate body in its
Annual General Meeting and the owner's right to receive payments is established.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to book income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies on accrual basis provided dividend on the shares has been declared by the corporate body in it

controls.control_objective: To ensure book income from government securities and bonds and debentures of corporate bodies on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall book income from Government securities and bonds and debentures of
corporate bodies on accrual basis, where interest rates on these instruments are pre-
determined and provided interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to book income from government securities and bonds and debentures of corporate bodies on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure book income from units of mutual funds on cash basis
controls.control_description: A MGC shall book income from units of mutual funds on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to book income from units of mutual funds on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only on cash basis
controls.control_description:
Income including interest/ discount or any other charges on an asset which is NPA or
on an asset which is NPA and is taken over from creditor institution on happening of
trigger event shall be recognised only on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure account the premium or fee on the mortgage guarantee contracts as an income in the profit and loss account in accordance with the applicable accountin
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall account the premium or fee on the mortgage guarantee contracts as an
income in the profit and loss account in accordance with the applicable Accounting
Standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account the premium or fee on the mortgage guarantee contracts as an income in the profit and loss account in accordance with the applicable accountin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as a separate line on the liability side of the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
The amount of unearned premium shall be shown as a separate line on the
liability side of the balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as a separate line on the liability side of the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised as per income recognition norms prescribed for such assets in these directions
controls.control_description:
In respect of any other business undertaken by the MGC as specified in Section 45
I(c) of the Act, within the permitted limit, income shall be recognised as per income
recognition norms prescribed for such assets in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised as per income recognition norms prescribed for such assets in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after taking into account the degree of well defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall, after taking into account the degree of well defined credit weaknesses
and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its assets, loans
and advances and any other forms of credit into the following classes, namely:
(1) Standard assets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after taking into account the degree of well defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling
controls.control_description:
The class of assets referred to above shall not be upgraded merely as a result of
rescheduling, unless it satisfies the conditions as stipulated by the Reserve Bank from
time to time, required for the upgradation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in Paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and
Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation

controls.control_objective: To ensure lend to (1) any single borrower exceeding 15 per cent of its tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall not lend to
(1) any single borrower exceeding 15 per cent of its Tier 1 capital;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lend to (1) any single borrower exceeding 15 per cent of its tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the mgc's latest available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review)
controls.control_description:
(3) 2[The applicable Tier 1 Capital for compliance with the norms stated in sub-
paragraphs 41(1) and 41(2) above, shall be determined based on the MGC's latest
available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review).]
(4) 3[The term "Tier 1 Capital" in this context shall be as defined in paragraph
8(31) of the Master Directions.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the mgc's latest available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review)

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a policy in respect of exposures to a single party / a single group of parties
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall formulate a policy in respect of exposures to a single party / a single
group of parties.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a policy in respect of exposures to a single party / a single group of parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into credit risk by applying the conversion factors as explained in these directions
controls.control_description:
Notes:
(1) For determining the limits, off-balance sheet exposures shall be converted
into credit risk by applying the conversion factors as explained in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into credit risk by applying the conversion factors as explained in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as credit and not investment
controls.control_description:
(2) The investments in debentures for the purposes specified in this paragraph
shall be treated as credit and not investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as credit and not investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to credit exposure by such a mgc to companies/ firms in its own group as well as to the borrower company's group
controls.control_description:
(3) These ceilings shall be applicable to credit exposure by such a MGC to
companies/ firms in its own group as well as to the borrower company's group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to credit exposure by such a mgc to companies/ firms in its own group as well as to the borrower company's group

controls.control_objective: To ensure create and maintain a 'contingency reserve' on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description: A MGC shall create and maintain a 'Contingency Reserve' on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create and maintain a 'contingency reserve' on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriate each year at least 40 per cent of the premium or fee earned during that accounting year or 25 per cent of the profit (after provisions and
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall appropriate each year at least 40 per cent of the premium or fee earned
during that accounting year or 25 per cent of the profit (after provisions and tax),
whichever is higher, to the Contingency Reserve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriate each year at least 40 per cent of the premium or fee earned during that accounting year or 25 per cent of the profit (after provisions and

controls.control_objective: To ensure either result in or increase the amount of carry forward loss
controls.control_description:
In case of inadequate profits, such appropriation shall either result in or increase the
amount of carry forward loss.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either result in or increase the amount of carry forward loss

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriate a lower percentage of the premium or fee earned during any accounting year subject to a minimum of at least 24 per cent of the premium or
controls.control_description:
A MGC may appropriate a lower percentage of the premium or fee earned during any
accounting year subject to a minimum of at least 24 per cent of the premium or fee earned
when the provisions made each year towards losses on account of settlement of
mortgage guarantee claims exceeds 35 per cent of the premium or fee earned during that
accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriate a lower percentage of the premium or fee earned during any accounting year subject to a minimum of at least 24 per cent of the premium or

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the contingency reserve is built up to at least five per cent of the total outstanding mortgage guarantee commitments
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall ensure that the Contingency Reserve is built up to at least five per cent
of the total outstanding mortgage guarantee commitments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the contingency reserve is built up to at least five per cent of the total outstanding mortgage guarantee commitments

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain the amounts appropriated each year to the contingency reserve for a minimum period of seven subsequent years which shall be eligible for revers
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall retain the amounts appropriated each year to the Contingency Reserve
for a minimum period of seven subsequent years which shall be eligible for reversal only
in the eighth year subject to the condition in paragraph 47 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain the amounts appropriated each year to the contingency reserve for a minimum period of seven subsequent years which shall be eligible for revers

controls.control_objective: To ensure utilize the contingency reserve without the prior approval of the reserve bank solely for the purpose of meeting and making good the losses suffered b
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall utilize the Contingency Reserve without the prior approval of the Reserve
Bank solely for the purpose of meeting and making good the losses suffered by the
mortgaged guarantee holders only after exhausting all other avenues and options to
recoup the losses;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to utilize the contingency reserve without the prior approval of the reserve bank solely for the purpose of meeting and making good the losses suffered b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
in all other cases of utilization, prior approval of Reserve Bank shall
be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure show the amount of 'contingency reserve' as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall show the amount of 'Contingency Reserve' as a separate line item on
the liability side of the balance sheet;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show the amount of 'contingency reserve' as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'free reserve' for the purpose of net owned fund
controls.control_description:
however, Contingency Reserve may be treated as
'free reserve' for the purpose of net owned fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'free reserve' for the purpose of net owned fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 10 to 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: prese
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 10 to 12 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation
<image>
and Disclosures) Directions, 2025, paragraph 16 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 and
paragraph 34 to 36 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 10 to 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: prese

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold provisions for losses in respect of such invoked guarantees pending recovery of assets
controls.control_description:
(2) A MGC shall hold provisions for losses in respect of such invoked guarantees
pending recovery of assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold provisions for losses in respect of such invoked guarantees pending recovery of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be equal to the contract-wise aggregate of 'amount of invocation' after adjusting the realisable value of the assets held by the company in respect of
controls.control_description:
(3) The amount of provisions required to be held shall be equal to the contract-wise
aggregate of 'amount of invocation' after adjusting the realisable value of the assets
held by the company in respect of each housing loan where the guarantee has been
invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be equal to the contract-wise aggregate of 'amount of invocation' after adjusting the realisable value of the assets held by the company in respect of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adjusted against the shortfall in other invoked guarantees
controls.control_description:
(4) In case the realisable value of the assets held in respect of any invoked guarantee
is more than the amount of invocation, the excess shall not be adjusted against the
shortfall in other invoked guarantees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adjusted against the shortfall in other invoked guarantees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed after full recovery or closure of the invoked guarantee amount or after the account becomes standard
controls.control_description:
(5) In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above, the excess provision may be reversed after full recovery or closure
of the invoked guarantee amount or after the account becomes standard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed after full recovery or closure of the invoked guarantee amount or after the account becomes standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as a separate line item in the profit and loss account
controls.control_description:
(6) The amount of provisions made each year shall be shown as a separate line item
in the Profit and Loss Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as a separate line item in the profit and loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
(7) The amount of provision held for losses on settlement of invoked guarantees shall
be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold provisions in respect of such defaulted housing loans where the trigger event is yet to occur or the guarantee is yet to be invoked
controls.control_description:
(2) A MGC shall hold provisions in respect of such defaulted housing loans where the
trigger event is yet to occur or the guarantee is yet to be invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold provisions in respect of such defaulted housing loans where the trigger event is yet to occur or the guarantee is yet to be invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure be arrived at on an actuarial basis depending upon the estimates of loss frequency and loss severity for incurred but not reported losses which are de
controls.control_description:
(4) The amount of provisions required to be held shall be arrived at on an actuarial
basis depending upon the estimates of loss frequency and loss severity for incurred
but not reported losses which are derived from historic data, trends, economic factors
and other statistical data in relation to paid claims, the provisions held for claims
settled, risk statistics, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be arrived at on an actuarial basis depending upon the estimates of loss frequency and loss severity for incurred but not reported losses which are de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed
controls.control_description:
(5) In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above, the excess shall not be reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
(7) The amount of provision held for IBNR losses shall be shown as a separate line
item on the liability side of the balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the
controls.control_description:
Subject to what has been mentioned above, a MGC shall, after taking into account
the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the
realisation of the security and the erosion over time in the value of security charged, make
provision against each class as provided hereunder :-
(1) Mortgage guarantee assets
The provisioning requirement in respect of mortgage guarantee assets shall be as under:
Notes:
(1) The provisions on standard asset should not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be made on npas on total outstanding balances
controls.control_description:
(3) It is clarified that income recognition on and provisioning against NPAs are two
different aspects of prudential norms and provisions as per the norms are required to be made on NPAs on total outstanding balances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made on npas on total outstanding balances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written off
controls.control_description:
(i) Loss
The entire asset shall be written off.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written off

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for
controls.control_description: If the assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the outstanding should be provided for;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made
controls.control_description:
(a) 100% provision to the extent to which the advance is not covered
by the realisable value of the security to which the MGC has a valid recourse shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made
controls.control_description:
(iii) Sub-
A general provision of 10 per cent of total outstanding shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure make general provisions for standard asset on the following basis
controls.control_description:
(iv) Standard
A MGC should make general provisions for standard asset on the following basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make general provisions for standard asset on the following basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 86 to 100 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed asse
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 86 to 100 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 86 to 100 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed asse

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 13 to paragraph 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statemen
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 13 to paragraph 15 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 13 to paragraph 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statemen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mgcs
controls.control_description:
Disclosure requirements as prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
2025 shall be applicable to MGCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mgcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) dir
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest only in the following instruments: (1) government securities
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall invest only in the following instruments:
(1) Government Securities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest only in the following instruments: (1) government securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in subsidiaries and joint ventures
controls.control_description: A MGC shall not invest in subsidiaries and joint ventures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in subsidiaries and joint ventures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disposed of by the mgc within a period of three years or within such period as extended by the reserve bank, from the date of such acquisition
controls.control_description:
Provided that a MGC may hold investments in equity shares of any company which
may be quoted or unquoted or other unquoted investments acquired in satisfaction
of its debts which shall be disposed of by the MGC within a period of three years or
within such period as extended by the Reserve Bank, from the date of such
acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disposed of by the mgc within a period of three years or within such period as extended by the reserve bank, from the date of such acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake transactions in government securities through its gilt account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
A MGC may undertake transactions in Government securities through its gilt account
or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake transactions in government securities through its gilt account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold not less than 25 per cent of its total investment portfolio in central and state government securities
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall hold not less than 25 per cent of its total investment portfolio in Central
and State Government securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold not less than 25 per cent of its total investment portfolio in central and state government securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be invested as the board considers prudent, but with a ceiling of 25 per cent in any one category, i
controls.control_description:
The remaining investments may be invested as the Board considers prudent, but with
a ceiling of 25 per cent in any one category, i.e., listed and rated corporate bonds and
debentures or debt oriented mutual fund units, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be invested as the board considers prudent, but with a ceiling of 25 per cent in any one category, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix an appropriate sub-limit for individual investments within each category of instruments specified in paragraph 59 above
controls.control_description:
The Board may fix an appropriate sub-limit for individual investments within each
category of instruments specified in paragraph 59 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to fix an appropriate sub-limit for individual investments within each category of instruments specified in paragraph 59 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest only in bonds / debentures and debt oriented mutual funds having at least minimum investment grade rating (migr) assigned by the sebi registere
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall invest only in bonds / debentures and debt oriented mutual funds having
at least Minimum Investment Grade Rating (MIGR) assigned by the SEBI registered
Rating Agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest only in bonds / debentures and debt oriented mutual funds having at least minimum investment grade rating (migr) assigned by the sebi registere

controls.control_objective: To ensure , for the purposes of valuation, be grouped into the following categories, viz
controls.control_description:
Quoted investments shall, for the purposes of valuation, be grouped into the following
categories, viz.,
(1) Government securities including treasury bills,
(2) Government guaranteed bonds/ securities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , for the purposes of valuation, be grouped into the following categories, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or market value whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
Quoted investments for each category except Government Securities including
treasury bills, Government guaranteed bonds or securities shall be valued at cost or
market value whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or market value whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'held to maturity' (htm) for the purpose of valuation and accounted for accordingly
controls.control_description:
The investments made towards Government securities, quoted or otherwise,
government guaranteed securities and bonds not exceeding the capital may be treated
as 'Held to Maturity' (HTM) for the purpose of valuation and accounted for accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'held to maturity' (htm) for the purpose of valuation and accounted for accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, effect the transfer of the government security from htm category to afs category at the beginning of each half year, on april 01 or october 01, with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
A MGC may, at its discretion, effect the transfer of the government security from HTM
category to AFS category at the beginning of each half year, on April 01 or October 01,
with the approval of the Board, provided the principal amount is reinvested in another
Government security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, effect the transfer of the government security from htm category to afs category at the beginning of each half year, on april 01 or october 01, with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried at acquisition cost
controls.control_description:
Investments classified under HTM need not be marked to market and shall be carried
at acquisition cost, unless it is more than the face value, in which case the premium shall
be amortised over the period remaining to maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried at acquisition cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be reduced to the extent of the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period
controls.control_description:
The book value of the security shall continue to be reduced to the extent of the amount
amortised during the relevant accounting period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be reduced to the extent of the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered scrip-wise and the cost and market value aggregated for all investments in each category
controls.control_description:
The investments in each category shall be considered scrip-wise and the cost and
market value aggregated for all investments in each category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered scrip-wise and the cost and market value aggregated for all investments in each category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for or charged to the profit and loss account
controls.control_description:
If the aggregate market value for the category is less than the aggregate cost for that
category, the net depreciation shall be provided for or charged to the profit and loss
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for or charged to the profit and loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored
controls.control_description:
If the aggregate market value for the category exceeds the aggregate cost for
the category, the net appreciation shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ignored

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set off against appreciation in another category
controls.control_description:
Depreciation in one category of investments shall not be set off against appreciation
in another category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set off against appreciation in another category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mtm in accordance with these directions
controls.control_description: All other investments shall be MTM in accordance with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mtm in accordance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued as under: (1) unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds shall be valued at the net asset value (nav) declared by the mutual fund in
controls.control_description:
Unquoted investments acquired in satisfaction of its debts shall be valued as under:
(1) Unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds shall be valued at the net
asset value (NAV) declared by the mutual fund in respect of each particular
scheme;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued as under: (1) unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds shall be valued at the net asset value (nav) declared by the mutual fund in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or breakup value, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
(2) Unquoted equity shares shall be valued at cost or breakup value, whichever
is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or breakup value, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure substitute fair value for the breakup value of the shares
controls.control_description:
However, a MGC may substitute fair value for the breakup value of the
shares, if considered necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to substitute fair value for the breakup value of the shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at ₹1/- per company
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1/- per company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or face value, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
(3) Unquoted preference shares shall be valued at cost or face value,
whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or face value, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as term loans or other type of credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income recognition and ass
controls.control_description:
Note: Unquoted debentures shall be treated as term loans or other type of
credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the
purpose of income recognition and asset classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as term loans or other type of credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income recognition and ass

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame an investment policy in tune with these directions
controls.control_description:
A MGC with the approval of the Board shall frame an investment policy in tune with
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame an investment policy in tune with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that at least one of the non-executive directors of the board of the company in the audit committee shall be a chartered accountant
controls.control_description:
It shall be
ensured that at least one of the non-executive Directors of the Board of the company in
the Audit Committee shall be a Chartered Accountant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that at least one of the non-executive directors of the board of the company in the audit committee shall be a chartered accountant

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 26 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 26 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 26 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 27 and 28 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 27 and 28 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 27 and 28 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 29 to 37 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 29 to 37 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 29 to 37 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep one or more registers in which shall be entered the particulars of guarantee provided by the company, namely, (1) name and address of the borrowe
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall keep one or more registers in which shall be entered the particulars of
guarantee provided by the company, namely,
(1) name and address of the borrower / co-borrower,
(2) date and amount of loan sanctioned to the borrower,
(3) brief description of the property including the site / location of the property,
(4) the nature of security available for the loan,
(5) tenure of the loan,
(6) amount of each installment and due date for the payment of each installment,
(7) name and address of the bank or housing finance company to whom the guarantee has been provided,
(8) date and amount of the guarantee, and
(9) duration of the guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep one or more registers in which shall be entered the particulars of guarantee provided by the company, namely, (1) name and address of the borrowe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as stipulated in the contract of guarantee entered into by and between the mgc, the creditor institution and the borrower
controls.control_description:
The liability of the MGC in respect of a secured housing loan granted by a creditor
institution where the MGC has provided a guarantee shall be as stipulated in the contract
of guarantee entered into by and between the MGC, the creditor institution and the
borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as stipulated in the contract of guarantee entered into by and between the mgc, the creditor institution and the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to invoke the guarantee against the mgc
controls.control_description:
On any day after a trigger event, the creditor institution, which has obtained a
