mortgage guarantee from a MGC, shall be entitled to invoke the guarantee against the
MGC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled to invoke the guarantee against the mgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure make good the guarantee liability without demur as and when a notice of demand for the payment of the guarantee liability in respect of the mortgage g
controls.control_description:
The MGC shall make good the guarantee liability without demur as and when a notice
of demand for the payment of the guarantee liability in respect of the mortgage guarantee
provided by it in favour of a bank or a housing finance company is received by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make good the guarantee liability without demur as and when a notice of demand for the payment of the guarantee liability in respect of the mortgage g

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 90 per cent
controls.control_description:
However, for small value housing loans i.e
housing loans up to ₹20 lakh (which get categorized as priority sector advances), LTV
ratio should not exceed 90 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 90 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be satisfied, amongst others, with the following: (1) that the loans are secured by a valid mortgage
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be satisfied, amongst others, with the following: (1) that the loans are secured by a valid mortgage

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc
controls.control_description:
Every MGC shall communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc., as
prescribed in paragraph 6 and 7 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a mortgage guarantee for a housing loan which is not secured by a valid mortgage of the house / residential property that is or is proposed to
controls.control_description:
A MGC shall not provide a mortgage guarantee for a housing loan which is not
secured by a valid mortgage of the house / residential property that is or is proposed to
be acquired by such loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a mortgage guarantee for a housing loan which is not secured by a valid mortgage of the house / residential property that is or is proposed to

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay commissions, rebates, or other inducements for referral of mortgage guarantee business to any person
controls.control_description:
No commissions, rebates or inducements: A MGC shall not pay commissions,
rebates, or other inducements for referral of mortgage guarantee business to any person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay commissions, rebates, or other inducements for referral of mortgage guarantee business to any person

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide guarantees on mortgage originations of promoters, its / their subsidiaries, associates and related parties or subsidiaries, associates and rel
controls.control_description:
Prohibition on guaranteeing mortgage originations of Related Party: A MGC
shall not provide guarantees on mortgage originations of promoters, its / their
subsidiaries, associates and related parties or subsidiaries, associates and related
parties of MGC including companies where the MGC has a material investment or interest
of five percent or more of the shareholding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide guarantees on mortgage originations of promoters, its / their subsidiaries, associates and related parties or subsidiaries, associates and rel

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in notes or other evidences of indebtedness secured by a mortgage or other lien upon real property
controls.control_description:
Investments: A MGC shall not invest in notes or other evidences of indebtedness
secured by a mortgage or other lien upon real property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in notes or other evidences of indebtedness secured by a mortgage or other lien upon real property

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to obligations secured by real property, or contracts for the sale of real property, which obligations or contracts of sale are acquired in the
controls.control_description:
This shall not apply to obligations
secured by real property, or contracts for the sale of real property, which obligations or
contracts of sale are acquired in the course of the good faith settlement of claims under
policies issued by the MGC, or in good faith disposition of real property so acquired.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to obligations secured by real property, or contracts for the sale of real property, which obligations or contracts of sale are acquired in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure lend against its own shares
controls.control_description:
Loans against own shares of the MGC are prohibited
(1) A MGC shall not lend against its own shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lend against its own shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recovered by the mgc as per the repayment schedule before grant of certificate of registration to it
controls.control_description:
(2) Any outstanding loan against its own shares shall be recovered by the MGC as
per the repayment schedule before grant of Certificate of Registration to it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recovered by the mgc as per the repayment schedule before grant of certificate of registration to it

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy for the company for providing mortgage guarantee to creditor institutions
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors of a MGC shall frame a policy for the company for providing
mortgage guarantee to creditor institutions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy for the company for providing mortgage guarantee to creditor institutions

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, stipulate the following: (1) the fee or premium chargeable for providing a mortgage guarantee based on specific identified criteria incl
controls.control_description:
Such policy shall, inter alia, stipulate the
following:
(1) the fee or premium chargeable for providing a mortgage guarantee based on
specific identified criteria including the quantum of loan;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, stipulate the following: (1) the fee or premium chargeable for providing a mortgage guarantee based on specific identified criteria incl

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a detailed scheme duly approved by its board of directors
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of providing mortgage guarantee, the MGC shall prepare a detailed
scheme duly approved by its Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a detailed scheme duly approved by its board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain, inter alia, the following matters: (1) the quality of a housing loan, (2) the maximum portion of a housing loan granted by a bank or a housin
controls.control_description:
The scheme shall contain, inter alia, the
following matters:
(1) the quality of a housing loan,
(2) the maximum portion of a housing loan granted by a bank or a housing finance
company to a borrower, that may be covered under the contract of guarantee,
(3) the minimum and the maximum LTV ratio of a housing loan proposed to be covered
under the contract of guarantee,
(4) the fee or premium or charge indicating the manner for the payment there of,
payable by a borrower to the MGC in consideration for the contract of guarantee,
(5) the liability of the MGC as to whether the liability will be coextensive with that of
the borrower or otherwise, and
(6) the conditions governing the issue as to which party of the MGC or a bank / housing
finance company will be required to effect recoveries from the borrower after the
mortgage guarantee is invoked and the guarantee liability is made good by the MGC
to the bank or housing finance company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain, inter alia, the following matters: (1) the quality of a housing loan, (2) the maximum portion of a housing loan granted by a bank or a housin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the reserves required under indian law for a mgc
controls.control_description:
Whenever a MGC obtains counter-guarantee cover in respect of the housing loans
guaranteed by it from another MGC, the MGC and the counter-guarantee company shall
establish and maintain the reserves required for a MGC in India in appropriate proportions
in relation to the risk retained by the original MGC and ceded to the assuming counter-
guarantee company so that the total reserves established shall not be less than the
reserves required under Indian law for a MGC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the reserves required under indian law for a mgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold relevant reserves and provisions in respect of all outstanding mortgage guarantee contracts issued by it
controls.control_description:
In case the counter-guarantee company is not regulated by the regulator(s) in India,
the MGC guaranteeing the claim shall hold relevant reserves and provisions in respect of
all outstanding mortgage guarantee contracts issued by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold relevant reserves and provisions in respect of all outstanding mortgage guarantee contracts issued by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 14 and 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions
controls.control_description:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 14 and 15 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 14 and 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced and
any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter
covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the
RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
